The third 6-card expansion for Galdor's Grip.

Using the clever deck construction feature in Galdor's Grip, players can (randomly) mix and match any number of non-essential cards from the Core Set with cards from an expansion to create new card and deck and interactions! This expansion offers new scoring objectives and ways to manipulate the order of the deck.

Galdor's Grip is a solo fantasy card game played completely in your hands. As you move through the deck, you’ll need to carefully manipulate the order and orientation of the cards to gain more knowledge of your surroundings and avoid hazards until Galdor is in position to neutralize Feragot. The base game is needed to play this expansion.

Putin's War 2022 is a 2 player game, where both sides have a fair chance to win.

In Putin's War 2022 you as a player take the role of the Ukraine or the one of Russia.

Putin's War 2022 combines an area based combat system with political and economic interactions.

The combat system is a modern warfare version of the system used in games like Breakout Normandy (Avalon Hill), the Storm Over:.... series from (MMP), and Fortress Sevastopol (UGG).

The non combat elements have similarities to games like Imperial Struggle (GMT).

Putin's War 2022 is an asymmetric design. Russia is far superior in manpower, tanks, aircraft, artillery rockets, and drones. The Ukraine has better leadership and can improve its position with help from the EU and the USA.
Russia gets help from China, Iran, India and others. While the Ukraine player tries to improve the support from the West, Russia discredits western pro Ukraine politicians and conducts Cyber warfare.

As the Ukraine:

Survive the Russian Invasion, stabilize and built your army, organize International aid, gain economic and political influence, reconquer areas.

As the Russian Federation:

Try to break Ukraine resistance in an early massive assault, keep your army going and reduce losses, delay International aid for the Ukraine, discredit western politicians, undermine the enemy war effort with the help of Russian supporters in the west, gain economic and political influence.

Leaders have unique special abilities that can give each turn another impact. In addition they can bring bonus to certain cards and thus make card play more effective.
There are leaders originating from Russia and the Ukraine. Other leaders originate from countries, that can provide help to one side or the other. For example Xi Jingpin performs as Russian leader, while Joe Biden functions as an Ukrainian leader in the game.

Victory is based on winning Award areas. There both players can score Victory points for a Military-, Economical- or Political Victory.
The war continues after 2022, but the game can be won in one of the above patterns in 2022.

Yes, there will be expansions, that cover 2023 war actions. The designer is afraid that more than one expansion will be needed...

You are in command now, you decide what to do! Go here to preorder Putins War 2022:  https://ugg2nd.de/en/P-500/Putin-s-War-2022.html

—description from the designer

description:
The world shattered. The primal magic that used to bind the lands has been freed. Now everyone can drain from it. The era of heroes and necessary alliances has begun. Enter the ruins of a once glorious world, where magic flows freely and the lands are scattered across the skies.

Be the first faction to get the maximum Victory Points.  
You can trade your VP for cards. Use cards to create epic combos. The more VP you get, the stronger your spells become.
Collect VP for claiming lands (each board level is 1 point) or eliminating opponents (5 points).

Players fight using teams of two characters with unique abilities. Each turn players can use action points to: move, cast spells, claim land, use character ability or meditate (swap/draw card).

Plan your moves wisely as the higher you go, the lower you fell, and it hurts! Mind the position on the board of your and opponent's minis. It matters if you are hidden under an island or if you are on the verge of land. Someone can push you easily. Some spells cover wider areas or damage everything in the straight lines. Have fun.

How the Space Engine Works

Your space engine is responsible for powering four key systems aboard the ship:

Propulsion (red) – Without it, your ship won’t move.

Life Support (green) – Without it, your ship’s crew must be placed in stasis.

NavComm (blue) – Without it, your ship’s navigation computer won’t know where to go.

Sci/Ex (yellow) – Without it, your ship’s science and exploration equipment array will fail causing you to lose earth funding.

The Space Engine card deck opens up new possibilities for card games. This deck includes instructions for 5 games exclusive to the Space Engine.

This game includes:

52 System Cards - Cards with up to 3 systems working at various levels.

2 Quadrillithium Cards - The mysterious Quadrillithium can power any system.

Instructions for 5 games. Download the instructions for free!

boardgame: Shogun no Katana: Metal Katana Display
description: Whenever you deliver a sword, take the Metal Katana if you don't already have it. At the end of each round, the owning player can choose whether to add a Resource to the blueprint for his Shogun no Katana or to score 4 points.

Dice Masters brings Collectible Dice Building to the tabletop with this award-winning competitive game set in the Marvel universe!

Dice Masters is a global hit from WizKids. It uses the same proprietary Dice Building Game platform designed by Mike Elliott and Eric M. Lang.

Each Countertop Display Contains 8 Draft Packs. Draft Packs contain cards and dice that can be added to your collection as normal but are ALSO optimized for draft! Whether you’re drafting a team of heroes that normally appear together in comics, or you’re focusing on your favorite type of energy, there will be TONS of ways to draft this set! With more than 35 heroes and villains, this set is perfect for veteran players or beginners!

Brand new teams will make their Dice Masters debut! Players will get to collect Doom's minions, the heroes of Battleworld, and cosmic entities in all new ways! Even if they’re already in your Dice Masters collection – these heroes will play like you’ve never seen them before! Draft Packs are a fan-favorite format for Dice Masters!

With over 150 different cards (and their dice!) to collect, this set will help you bring some Uncanny excitement to the tabletop!

—description from the publisher

Introducing our latest innovation, the AR Vault: Story Dice. Elevate your gaming experience with fresh twists on storytelling, stunning dice, and unpredictable outcomes. Whether you're a tabletop RPG fanatic or a board game enthusiast, we've got you covered! Our Story Dice are 5e compatible, making them perfect for RPG players seeking something new and exciting. For Awaken Realms board game lovers, we offer dice expansions to bring an extra level of gameplay to your favorite games.

This set contains 2 Resin dice and 2 rule cards

D10:
When players perform an action on a Threat card, they now have the option to roll for a chance of receive extra bonuses. And while using the die incurs an additional cost, the rewards can be well worth the risk.

Danger:
When players roll a Danger die and consult the reference card, they now have the option to use this alternate ISS Danger die. With a higher chance of rolling more negative results, this die adds an exciting element of risk to each roll. But its not all doom and gloom - some sides also feature a special symbol with a highly positive effect!

—description from the publisher

description:
The merciless party game is the second game from the party fever series by DENKRIESEN and has 300 cards with a total of 900 child's play to tricky terms to doodle on board. In this game, no new "Picasso" is sought, because anyone can doodle! You can play against the clock, cleverly each against each other or in the exciting team mode. This game promises super fun, casual doodling fun for the next game night with family and friends. Thanks to the included doodle boards, the SECOND cube and foil pens for up to 8 players, nothing stands in the way of an instant KRITZELSCHLACHT.

Gameplay Mode 1 of 3 - Everyone against everyone.

The first player draws a KRITZEL card from the deck and places it in the card holder for all other players to see, without looking at it himself. The other players now scribble, as fast and as well as they can, all three terms. The first doodler who has drawn all three terms then shouts "STOP". All doodlers must then stop drawing immediately. The scribble card is now placed face down and the scoring begins. The card drawer first tries to guess the terms of the fastest doodler. Only if three terms are correctly guessed does the fastest scribbler win. For each guessed term the now guessing card drawer gets one point. If a term cannot be guessed by the fastest scribbler, the scribbler does not receive a single point in this round. Now the card drawer guesses clockwise with the doodle boards of the other players. The other players receive one point for each additional term guessed until all terms have been guessed.

—description from the publisher (translated)

Das gnadenlose Partyspiel ist das zweite Spiel aus der Partyfieber-Serie von DENKRIESEN und hat 300 Karten mit insgesamt 900 kinderleichten bis kniffligen Begriffen zum Kritzeln an Bord. In diesem Spiel wird kein neuer „Picasso“ gesucht, denn kritzeln kann jeder! Man spielt rasant gegen die Zeit, clever jeder gegen jeden oder im spannenden Teammodus. Dieses Spiel verspricht superlustigen, lockeren Kritzelspaß für den nächsten Spieleabend mit Familie und Freunden. Dank den enthaltenen Kritzelboards, dem SEKUNDENWürfel und Folienstiften für bis zu 8 Spieler steht einer sofortigen KRITZELSCHLACHT nichts im Wege.

Spielablauf Modus 1 von 3 - Jeder gegen jeden

Der erste Spieler zieht eine KRITZEL-Karte vom Stapel und platziert sie für alle Mitspieler sichtbar in dem Kartenhalter, ohne sie sich selbst anzusehen. Die Mitspieler kritzeln nun, so schnell und gut sie können, alle drei Begriffe. Der erste Kritzler der alle drei Begriffe gezeichnet hat, ruft dann „STOPP“. Alle Kritzler müssen dann sofort aufhören zu zeichnen. Die KRITZEL-Karte wird jetzt verdeckt hingelegt und die Auswertung beginnt. Der Kartenzieher versucht zuerst, die Begriffe des schnellsten Kritzlers zu erraten. Nur bei drei korrekt erratenen Begriffen gewinnt der schnellste Kritzler. Für jeden erratenen Begriff bekommt der nun ratende Kartenzieher einen Punkt. Kann ein Begriff beim schnellsten Kritzler nicht erraten werden, bekommt der Kritzler in dieser Runde keinen einzigen Punkt. Nun rät der Kartenzieher im Uhrzeigersinn mit den Kritzelboards der Mitspieler weiter. Diese bekommen pro weiteren erratenen Begriff jeweils einen Punkt, bis alle Begriffe erraten sind.

—description from the publisher

boardgame: Trouble: Spider-Man Across the Spider-Verse Part One
description:
Marvel fans can imagine an exciting Spider-Verse adventure with The Trouble Game: Spider-Man Across The Spider-Verse Part One edition board game! Players assemble their spider-team then move through Spider-Verses among the 3 different gameboard rings. The first player to get all of their team safely back Home wins. The Pop-O-Matic die roller determines how far a player can move, and if they can twist and turn any of the gameboard rings. Launch into action by lining up Portal spaces to move into another universe, but watch out for Spot spaces that can bump players back!


     TROUBLE GAME WITH SPIDER-VERSE THEME: It's a Spider-Man twist on the classic Trouble game! Players race their hero through the Spider-Verse to be the first one to get their team to the Goober and back Home



     SPINNING GAMEBOARD: It's a different Trouble gameplay experience as players twist and turn 3 movable board rings to connect and unlock Portal spaces, move pawns through the rings, and block the competition



     POP THE DICE: Players pop the iconic Pop-O-Matic die roller and take different actions depending on the number and symbol shown on the 2 dice



     SPIDER-VERSE GAMEBOARD SPACES: Each space on the gameboard has players doing different actions, but they can only move through the rings by lining up the Portal spaces


—description from the publisher

description:
Dornog the Spider adds a new menace in the Faeriell realm.

Dornog the Spider is a Corrupted creature, which can be put in play from the beginning of the game with its own miniature. The Spider is moved by players and affects the Region where it is placed with an emanation of Corruption.

boardgame: We Only Kill Each Other (Second Edition)
description:
Expanded to 112 pages, We Only Kill Each Other 2nd edition has improved text and some clarified rules, but the real change is the addition of two entirely new sections.

"Hood's Life" provides rules that allow players' Characters with activities not directly involved with the crimes they commit, but rather ways to fill their time away from the "job." Gangster, Hoodlum, or even Cop, his or her "Reputation" can be vital to success, and must be built and protected to increase authority and bring greater rewards. Police can even win Medals! "Friends and Foes" will inevitably be made, people to keep close, and others to keep closer as they can aid your climb in the Underworld or Law Enforcement--or bring you down. And what do you do with your crime generating money? "Living Within Your Means" provides the incentive to keep making more money--especially when it's running short. But that same money permits a crook the opportunity for "Living Large"--enjoying that flow of cash and helping build the kind of Reputation that serves him best. Not exactly a pastime, but giving "The Look" is an Underworld tradition that can cow enemies without direct use of violence. Other rules include how to conduct "Extortion" through the threat and use of violence, the effects and results of facing "Prosecutions," including conviction, prison time or even The Chair, and "Wound Recovery" so that injuries suffered in a previous game can determine how long to heal--or how quickly they prove fatal. Finally, there are extensive rules for the effects of Newspapers on careers, as well as how a Reporter/Photographer can participate in raids and gun battles between Law Enforcement and Gangsters. All of these rules allow players to determine the fate of their Characters through their life in crime.

The other new section is "Dillinger Days--Life On The Run," rules for organizing one's own career as a bank robber, and even building a gang of his own. From starting with their "Wheels," to choosing a Hideout, planning and executing a bank heist, and making a getaway only to plan the next one, everything is there. New Game Maps provide the "Tri-State" area in which to conduct your own Crime Spree, with "Risks of The Road" and the chance of The Law in "Hot Pursuit," using a new Game Card Deck (sent free for the asking), while racing through city streets. Figuring and dividing "The Take," "Hiding Out" while "The Heat" is on, and always the danger that you or one of your gang will be "Fingered," bringing Law Enforcement down on you.

In short, WOKEO is the most complete set of miniatures wargame rules on the subject of Crime and Law Enforcement of the era ever.

—description from the publisher

CHAOS PACK 3

EXPANDS: CORRODED CORRIDOR including CAVE EVIL & WARCULTS

We rally cried for players to create a Chaos Pack and they delivered! We received many submissions for art and card text, it was wondrous to behold. All cards are as close to the actual submission as possible.

45 New Player Created Cards!!
Add cards to Conjuration and other Decks

3 - 11” x 17” Mini Maps!
THE PITS and DOUBLE TROUBLE TUNNEL (2 map challenge)
Maps can be played on its own, added on top of other maps, or can extend maps.

A unique print-and-play horror board game for 1-8 players, based on the Frankenstein mythos.

This game is for 4-8 players assuming the roles of characters inspired by one of the world’s greatest horror stories spanning books and movies.

With this base set, you’ll get two different playing experiences as you dive deep into the darkness of an evil-filled world:
The base game for 4-8 players, and a solo-play highly-narrative campaign.

The game plays in a maximum of 6 rounds, each one dividen in 3 phases:

     Gather, In which you select one of the 6 options to gain resources, with an unique system that allows you to receive resources from adjacent players (you give them resources too).
     Conspire, You will hire a service in one of the 8 available locations (2 possible actions per location), which will be resolved in the next phase (survive).


Interlude: You can reveal your secret character to activate your unique character power and get close to your objective.

     Survive, The hired actions resolve in location order, hurting some players, protecting others or giving you that advantage you need to achieve victory.


Reaching the personal goal will cause the end of the game. Some characters may do it during phase 3, others at the end of that phase. The winner will be the person with the most Victory points (reaching the goal will give a gross amount of those sweet points).

—description from the publisher

boardgame: Shadows of Brimstone: A Trick Up Your Sleeve Promo Card
description:
A secret promo card handed out at Dicefest 2022, only to those that attended a joke panel. Aaron from Flying Frogs claimed to have the ultimate secret to painting, and offered a panel on his finding. He jokingly stalled the entire time, then told guests he would tell them one at a time in a private room what the secret was. Once at the back room, he would tell the guest to keep the joke going and pretend there was a crazy secret, and this card was given as a thanks.

Gear Card: Discard to choose one die just rolled and turn it to be any face of that die instead of what it rolled. (Discarding of this item may not be prevented in any way).

boardgame: Shadows of Brimstone: 2 Elemental Dragons Promo Card
description:
An exclusive promo card offered during the Forbidden Fortress Kickstarter. A second Sho Riu must have been added to your pledge in order to get this card.

Epic Threat: Draw an enemy trait card for each elemental dragon. lesser Dragons… Elemental dragons have -40 health each.

boardgame: Shadows of Brimstone: A Cunning Disguise
description:
A promo card given to those at Dicefest 2022 who entered the costume contest:

Gear card: Discard to cancel an attack targeting you (even after dice have been rolled to hit), or to remove all unwanted attention markers from every hero.

boardgame: Shadows of Brimstone: Rotten to the Core Promo Card
description:
AN exclusive Darkness promo card given to certain attendees of Dicefest 2022. In order to receive this card, you must have checked out Shadows of Brimstone from the game library, where you were then given a secret mission for the game, and those that participated received this card.

Darkness: ALl undead enemies gain Rotten 5+ - Immune to critical hits and rolls the heal every wound it has at the start of the turn, on a D6 roll of 5+ each (Max heal 5 per turn). Remains in play.

3-2-1 Blast Off! With Mudpuppy’s Otter Space Game launch your rocket and land on a color-matching planet to score and win the game. Perfect for family game night!

—description from the publisher

What is this mess? An elephant jumping like a frog? A chicken roaring like a donkey? Surely that has something to do with Felix-Fauli and one of his funny games! Just join in and look for the right part of the cat or think about where the snake has hidden. But beware! If you make a mistake, it's time to imitate the movement and the sounds of the crazy animal combination together.
Who will find the most pairs of animals at the end of this animal fun?

—description from the publisher

Playing on a famous horror movie trope, Final Girl is a solitaire-only game that puts the player in the shoes of a female protagonist who must kill the slasher if she wants to survive.

The Core Box, when combined with one of our Feature Film Boxes, has everything you need to play the game. Each Feature Film Box features a unique Killer and and iconic Location, and the more Feature Films you have, the more killer/location combinations you can experience!

In game terms, Final Girl shares similarities with Hostage Negotiator, but with some key differences that change it up, including a game board to track locations and character movement. You can choose from multiple characters when picking someone to play and multiple killers when picking someone to play against. Killers and locations each have their own specific terror cards that will be shuffled together to create a unique experience with various combinations of scenarios for you to play!

This starter pack contains the basic box and the feature film "The Happy Trails Horror", which will allow you to start playing immediately!
language_dependency: 4: Extensive use of text - massive conversion needed to be playable

boardgame: にくの細道 マッチョ芭蕉筋肉紀行 The Narrow Road to the muscle
description:
You are a young man of the bone tribe who is usually laughed at as a poor muscle boy.
But a book you meet one day will change your life. The book is called “The Narrow Road to the muscle.”
It is a book about the process by which the legendary haiku master “Macho Basho” travelled around the country composing haiku and writing them.

After reading this book, you set out on a journey to get a perfect body by visiting gyms all over the country while composing haiku.

Players aim to collect the muscle parts while a journy. Collecting more muscle parts gives you higher MP(VP), and you also get higher MP(VP) if you reach to the goal faster than the other players. Player who got the highest MP(VP) is win and also get the perfect body!

—description from the designer

The hopeless party game is the third game from the party fever series by DENKRIESEN and has 300 cards with a total of 1500 different terms on board. A fellow player slips into the role of the clueless DUMMBATZ and tries to guess the term he is looking for based on clues from the other players. But be careful! All players must try to unmask the DUMMBATZ and lead him on the ice. This game is tactical, exciting, fast and loose and provides rousing party fun for the next game night. Thanks to the included writing boards and foil pens for up to 8 players, nothing stands in the way of instant fun.

Gameplay

The first player first gets all the boards, draws a DUMMBATZ card and chooses one of the five terms. Then he writes his chosen term on the empty player boards. The person sitting next to him shuffles the remaining player boards together with the DUMMBATZ board and distributes them among the other players. The player who got the DUMMBATZ board is the DUMMBATZ this round. Now the player who chose the term names the rubric and the teammate to his left is the first to name a descriptive tip that has anything to do with the term on his board. Then the other players follow one after the other with their tips. The DUMMBATZ now tries to guess which term is being searched for on the basis of the tips given. When it is the DUMMBATZ's turn, he must also try to describe the term he is looking for without being recognized as a DUMMBATZ. The other players try to determine who the DUMMBATZ could be based on the tips.

—description from the publisher (translated)

Das aussichtslose Partyspiel ist das dritte Spiel aus der Partyfieber-Serie von DENKRIESEN und hat 300 Karten mit insgesamt 1500 verschiedenen Begriffen an Bord. Ein Mitspieler schlüpft in die Rolle des ahnungslosen DUMMBATZ und versucht, den gesuchten Begriff anhand von Hinweisen der Mitspieler zu erraten. Doch Vorsicht! Alle Mitspieler müssen versuchen, den DUMMBATZ zu enttarnen und aufs Glatteis zu führen. Dieses Spiel ist taktisch, spannend, schnell und locker und sorgt für mitreißenden Partyspaß für den nächsten Spieleabend. Dank den enthaltenen Schreibboards und Folienstiften für bis zu 8 Spieler steht sofortigem Spielspaß nichts im Wege.

Spielablauf

Der erste Spieler bekommt zunächst alle Boards, zieht eine DUMMBATZ-Karte und wählt einen der fünf Begriffe aus. Dann schreibt er seinen gewählten Begriff auf die leeren Spielerboards. Der Sitznachbar mischt die verbleibenden Spielerboards zusammen mit dem DUMMBATZ-Board und verteilt sie unter den Mitspielern. Der Spieler, der das DUMMBATZ-Board bekommen hat, ist diese Runde der DUMMBATZ. Nun nennt der Spieler, der den Begriff gewählt hat, die Rubrik und der Mitspieler zu seiner Linken nennt als Erster einen beschreibenden Tipp, der irgendetwas mit dem Begriff auf seinem Board zu tun hat. Danach folgen die anderen Mitspieler nacheinander mit ihren Tipps. Der DUMMBATZ versucht nun, anhand der genannten Tipps zu erraten, welcher Begriff gesucht wird. Wenn der DUMMBATZ an der Reihe ist, muss auch er versuchen den gesuchten Begriff zu beschreiben, ohne dabei als DUMMBATZ erkannt zu werden. Die Mitspieler versuchen, anhand der Tipps festzustellen, wer der DUMMBATZ sein könnte.

—description from the publisher

This ultimate game block is the official new edition of the popular daredevil party game! The object here is to find the "common thing". Each player writes down a matching term for a category. The most mentioned term is the "Common Cause" at the end and leads to victory. But beware! With risky bets you can increase your points, but you can also lose everything. Sometimes crystal clear, but often surprising and hard to grasp, this creative game block will be an exciting highlight at your next party. Unpack and start playing right away, because you can bet on this game for sure!

Gameplay

Each player writes down a matching term for a category. The most mentioned term is the "COMMON THING" at the end and leads to victory. But beware! With risky bets you can increase your points, but also lose everything. Sometimes crystal clear, but often surprising and hard to grasp, this creative game block will be an exciting highlight at your next party. Unpack and start playing right away, because you can bet on this game for sure!

—description from the publisher (translated)

Dieser ultimative Spielblock ist die offizielle neue Edition des beliebten, waghalsigen Partyspiels! Hier geht es darum, die „Gemeinsame Sache“ zu finden. Jeder Spieler schreibt zu einer Kategorie einen passenden Begriff auf. Der meistgenannte Begriff ist am Ende die „Gemeinsame Sache“ und führt zum Sieg. Doch Achtung! Mit riskanten Wetteinsätzen kannst du deine Punkte zwar ausbauen, aber auch alles verlieren. Manchmal glasklar, doch oft auch überraschend und kaum zu fassen wird dieser kreative Spielblock zum spannenden Highlight auf deiner nächsten Party. Auspacken und direkt losspielen, denn auf dieses Spiel kannst du garantiert setzen!

Spielablauf

Jeder Spieler schreibt zu einer Kategorie einen passenden Begriff auf. Der meistgenannte Begriff ist am Ende die „GEMEINSAME SACHE" und führt zum Sieg. Doch Achtung! Mit riskanten Wetteinsätzen kannst du deine Punkte zwar ausbauen, aber auch alles verlieren. Manchmal glasklar, doch oft auch überraschend und kaum zu fassen wird dieser kreative Spielblock zum spannenden Highlight auf deiner nächsten Party. Auspacken und direkt losspielen, denn auf dieses Spiel kannst du garantiert setzen!

—description from the publisher

Entrenched is a deck-builder with a standard deck of 54 cards — but with abilities and stats on the cards — in which the objective is to either eliminate your opponent or score 9 points. The game is played on a board with six rows, representing trenches in World War 1, split between two sides: red and black. Players use the abilities of their cards and points to buy new cards, with each card having a value to buy other cards. The first three cards are free, while the other cards must be bought with the value of the cards in the player's hand.

Entering the opponent's territory earns the player points, with the closest rows to the opponent's base earning more points. The turn sequence is to play card actions, merge or unmerge units, buy units with points, and draw up to a maximum hand size of three. Cards can be used to attack, to go into a defensive position, or to move a card up or down one row.

In summary, players use their cards and points to buy new cards and attack their opponent or defend themselves on a board with six rows representing trenches. The game ends when one player is eliminated or when a player scores nine points.

—description from the designer

family: Players: Wargames with Rules Supporting Only Two Players

description:
We have spiced up and revolutionized the old and somewhat dusty ship sinking game in a cool design.

There are exciting special fields and rules that can quickly turn the game around, such as the flop shot.

The XXL ANTI-SCHUMMEL AUFSTELLER ensures that your opponent can not look at your game sheet. So cheating is a thing of the past.

GAME PROCEDURE:

Each player receives one side of the A5 pad and places it in front of them. Place the XXL-Anti-Schummel stand between you. Then agree on which names (and thus stars) you want to sink. The first one to sink all the stars wins. But beware! There are exciting special fields and rules that can quickly turn the game around. This keeps the game exciting until the bitter end. STARS VERSENKEN is a great, entertaining and communicative pastime for children and young-at-heart adults.

—description from the publisher (translated)

Wir haben das altbekannte und etwas eingestaubte Schiffe versenken in coolem Design aufgepeppt und revolutioniert.

Es gibt spannende Spezialfelder und Regeln welche das Spiel schnell umdrehen können, wie zum Beispiel der Flopschuss.

Der XXL ANTI-SCHUMMEL AUFSTELLER sorgt dafür, dass dein Gegner nicht auf dein Spielblatt schauen kann. Somit gehören Schummeleien der Vergangenheit an.

SPIELABLAUF:

Jeder Spieler erhält eine Seite des DIN-A5 Blockes und legt diese vor sich hin. Stellt den XXL-Anti Schummel Aufsteller zwischen euch auf. Dann einigt euch darauf, welche Namen (und damit Stars) Ihr versenken möchtet. Wer zuerst alle Stars versenkt hat, hat gewonnen. Doch Achtung! Es gibt spannende Spezialfelder und Regeln welche das Spiel schnell umdrehen können. Dadurch bleibt es spannend bis zum bitteren Ende. STARS VERSENKEN ist ein toller, kurzweiliger und kommunikativer Zeitvertreib für Kinder und junggebliebene Erwachsene.

—description from the publisher

The Melbourne Cup Racing Game is simple spin and move horse race. Players select one of 5 plastic horses that have a base that is slotted into the board. The board is glued into the the game box base. It appears that the game play and layout is identical to that of the Whitman Kentucky Derby game

Players take it in turns to spin the Spinner which has 5 horses name. The horse name that comes up advances that horse one space down the slotted track. This is repeated until a horse crosses the finish post first and that player is the winner.

Of historical interest is the plastic horse names which were Melbourne Cup winners between 1951 and 1955. The Melbourne Cup is the richest 2 mile horse race in the world, first held in 1861.

—user summary

This ultimate game block is the innovative new edition of the well-known game classic "Hangman" and offers 160 tricky terms for lightning-fast lightning-fast guessing fun with family and friends.

GAME FLOW:

The HANGMAN says a letter and crosses it off the alphabet. The LETTER MASTER now says whether the letter is contained in the solution word and reveals the corresponding position in the solution word. The HANGMAN now enters the letter in the correct position. If the letter does not appear in the word, the HANGMAN must color in a body part. The game is over as soon as the HANGMAN has guessed the solution word correctly or all body parts have been colored in. Should the HANGMAN name a wrong solution word, a body part must be painted out as a penalty.

—description from the publisher (translated)

Dieser ultimative Spielblock ist die innovative Neuauflage des bekannten Spieleklassikers „Galgenmännchen“ und bietet 160 knifflige Begriffe für blitzschnellen Ratespaß mit Familie und Freunden.

SPIELABLAUF:

Der HANGMAN sagt einen Buchstaben und streicht diesen vom Alphabet weg. Der BUCHSTABENMEISTER sagt nun ob der Buchstabe in dem Lösungswort enthalten ist und verrät die entsprechende Position im Lösungswort. Der HANGMAN trägt nun den Buchstaben an der richtigen Position ein. Kommt der Buchstabe im Wort nicht vor, muss der HANGMAN ein Körperteil ausmalen. Das Spiel ist vorbei, sobald der HANGMAN das Lösungswort richtig erraten hat oder alle Körperteile ausgemalt sind. Sollte der HANGMAN ein falsches Lösungswort nennen, muss ein Körperteil als Strafe ausgemalt werden.

—description from the publisher

Who will be the fastest to find the odd one that crept into the image? An introductory game of observation and speed for sharp eagle eyes!

When all players are ready and paying attention, the active player turns over the first card in the pile and places it face up on the table. All players play at the same time and look at the card, searching for the odd one out: a small object or an animal that does not fit the theme of the scene on the card. The first player who thinks they found the odd one out places their index finger on the object and shouts its name. If the player gets it right, he wins the card and a new round begins. If the player gets it wrong, the round continues without them. To start a new round, the next player waits until everyone is ready and turns over a new card from the pile, and so on until all the cards have been turned over. The game ends when there are no more cards in the pile: the winner is whoever won the most cards!

This ultimate game block is the kid-friendly HANGMAN edition and offers

Thanks to the predefined terms, the game can begin immediately. You can always choose between 2 predefined, tricky terms per sheet.
This ultimate game block to fan out contains 80 sheets. So for many extensive rounds of play is ensured.

Loony Joe is about being the first to recognize which animal is depicted exactly 3x on a card.
The action cards include many different tasks and fun competitions.
Reactivity, observation skills and dexterity make you the winner in this game.

—description from the publisher (translated)

Bei Loony Joe geht es darum, als Erster zu erkennen, welches Tier genau 3x auf einer Karte abgebildet ist.
Die Aktionskarten beinhalten viele verschiedene Aufgaben und lustige Wettkämpfe.
Reaktionsfähigkeit, Beobachtungsgabe und Geschicklichkeit machen dich in diesem Spiel zum Gewinner.

—description from the publisher

On the blocks, get set, go! It's all about speed and skill. Compete against each other in many different modes and stack your blocks in a race. But watch out! Wildly mixed colors, misleading color names and crazy tasks won't make it easy for you. RANKLOTZEN is a fast and exciting game for family and friends. Unpack and start playing, perfect for in-between, whether at home or on the road. May the best "impostor" win!

—description from the publisher (translated)

Auf die Klötze, fertig, los! Hier dreht sich alles um Schnelligkeit und Geschick. Tretet in vielen verschiedenen Modi gegeneinander an und stapelt eure Klötze um die Wette. Aber Achtung! Wild gemischte Farben, irreführende Farbnamen und verrückte Aufgaben machen es euch nicht leicht. RANKLOTZEN ist ein schnelles und spannendes Spiel für Familie und Freunde. Hier ist Auspacken und Losspielen angesagt, perfekt für Zwischendurch, ob zu Hause oder unterwegs. Möge der beste „Hochstapler“ gewinnen!

—description from the publisher

More fun in a large group! This expansion set for our DENKRIESEN game RANKLOTZEN is perfect to expand your game group with 10 blocks by 2 players. Treat yourself to an epic game night with friends or family. On the blocks, get set, go!

—description from the publisher (translated)

Mehr Spaß in großer Runde! Dieses Erweiterungsset für unser DENKRIESEN Spiel RANKLOTZEN ist perfekt um deine Spielerunde mit 10 Klötzen um 2 Spieler zu vergrößern. Gönn dir einen epischen Spieleabend mit Freunden oder Familie. Auf die Klötze, fertig, los!

—description from the publisher

boardgame: Adventure Games: Books – Die Akademie der Zeitenwächter
description:
The first book to the successful Adventure Games.
One book, several possible outcomes and over 100 different decision possibilities.

—user summary

An exciting event is coming up for Drake: his final exam at the venerable Raven Academy. If he passes, he will finally be appointed a Time Keeper.
But mysterious events prevent Drake's graduation and ensure that he finds himself in a seemingly hopeless situation. Trapped in a strange time and pursued by a dark creature, he must quickly find a way out.
In order for him to succeed, he urgently needs your help!

The interactive reading experience based on the successful game series. A thrilling story with exciting twists and turns that you can influence.
Investigate the game locations, find and combine objects and solve puzzles.
Use the over 100 decision options to determine the outcome of the story.

—description from the publisher (translated)

Kickstarter Exclusive that brings a whole new feature to the game in the form of adorable and resourceful Companions to help the Heroes in their battles. From a loyal telepathic dog to a deceitfully cute “cat”, with maybe a land shark or frog in the mix as well, these little critters will stand united!

Companions is a new feature players can choose to add to their game, giving them more options and strategies (plus an adorable sidekick). If a Hero chooses to take a Companion with them, they simply shuffle the 3 Companion cards into their Hero deck and place the Companion’s game piece next to their Hero. Every turn, the player can move their Companion one Location for free. While Companions are not considered Heroes (they don’t take damage or suffer other effects), they do provide company so Heroes don’t count as being “alone” in their Location. Companion cards work just like Hero cards, providing an Action to the Hero and a Special Effect to their Companion.

The Pet Companions Kickstarter Exclusive expansion comes with:

1 Redwing Game Piece
1 Goose Game Piece
1 Jeffrey Game Piece
1 Throg Game Piece
1 Cosmo Game Piece
1 Alligator Loki Game Piece
3 Redwing Companion Cards
3 Goose Companion Cards
3 Jeffrey Companion Cards
3 Throg Companion Cards
3 Cosmo Companion Cards
3 Alligator Loki Companion Cards
3 Lockheed Companion Cards

This Kickstarter Exclusive brings a whole new way to play Marvel United, in the form of Campaigns! Each of these uses the full breadth of existing Marvel United components to recreate iconic story arcs from the comics! Players must battle through a series of 4 or 5 Games on average, facing events based on those comic storylines and living with the consequences of their actions.

The Kickstarter Exclusive Campaign Decks set contains 8 different Campaigns, for a total of 114 cards:

The Age of Apocalypse – 7 Games (23 cards)
War of Kings – 4 Games (16 cards)
Dark Phoenix Saga – 6 Games (16 cards)
Avengers vs. X-Men – 5 Games (17 cards)
X-Cutioner’s Song – 4 Games (13 cards)
Age of Ultron – 4 Games (8 cards)
Maximum Carnage – 3 Games (8 cards)
World War Hulk – 4 Games (13 cards)

Each campaign starts with a roster of Heroes that can be used in each game. As the campaign progresses, depending on what happens, new Heroes may be added to this roster while others are removed. New Heroes may even show up mid-game, depending on events!

At the start of each game, the Rules card indicates which Villain must be used, any mandatory Locations that must be in play, and any other special setup instructions. A few games will even require playing with certain Challenges or in different modes, like Team vs Team, Super Villain, or Clash of Heroes (one particular case even calls for a Commander Solo Mode game).

The back of a game’s Rules card indicates any special rules that must be used in that game, as well as listing triggers for specific Event cards. These could be if the Villain accomplishes a specific task, if the Heroes defeat a specific Henchman, if a specific Hero is KO’d, or many others. There are also usually triggers for winning the game or losing it (and also how the game is lost). When these triggers take place, players reveal the indicated Event card and resolve it. These might introduce a whole new set of rules to the game being played, changing it to a lesser or greater degree, they might affect the Heroes in specific ways, or add consequences for future games.

Winning the game, players then proceed to the next game in the campaign, oftentimes with special changes depending on how victory was achieved. However, losing the game does not necessarily mean the campaign is lost. Depending on how they lose, players may be able to tackle the same game again, with a special handicap or additional aid, or just proceed to the next game carrying a negative consequence. Defeated Heroes may be removed from the available roster, and eventually players may simply lose the campaign outright. If they manage to come through each adversity, unlocking special surprises along the way, players will emerge victorious at the end of richly thematic campaign!

-description from Kickstarter campaign

Marvel United is all about teamwork, and Heroes are known for forming specialized teams from time to time. Avengers, X-Men, Defenders, Guardians of the Galaxy, to name but a few. Each of these teams develops its own characteristics and strategies, though being part of a structured team also comes with limitations and drawbacks.


     Avengers
     New Avengers
     X-Men
     Uncanny X-Force
     Defenders
     A-Force
     Guardians of the Galaxy
     Deadpool Team-Up
     Asgardians & Allies
     Spider-Army
     Champions
     Wakandans
     United Heroes
     Team Iron Man: Pro Registration
     Team Captain America: Secret Avengers


When adding a Team Deck to your game, all Heroes being used must be part of the same Team, and the Hard Challenge difficulty level should be used. That Team deck is shuffled and placed facedown within view of all players, with 2 cards revealed to form the Team Display. These are essentially Hero cards, with Action symbols at the bottom and a Special Effect. On their turn, a Hero can choose to either play a regular turn or they can choose to play a Team turn. In that case they don’t touch their Hero cards (neither drawing nor playing) but choose instead one of the Team cards in the Display and play that card in the Storyline, as if it were their own card. Immediately a new card is drawn from the deck to fill the Team Display (until the deck runs out). This not only brings a different flavor to the match, but also gives Heroes more options of what to do on their turn. However, there is a downside to playing as a Team. Most Team decks have at least one card with a mandatory negative effect. This is in effect as long as that card is faceup on the Team Display. In order to shut it down, a Hero must take one for the team by taking a Team turn, choosing the negative card, and playing it facedown in the Storyline.

All Teams in this set can be played using solely Heroes which are part of boxes that are (or will be) available on retail. Although, of course, most of these Teams also have additional members who are part of exclusive expansions or Stretch Goals from this or previous campaigns. In the lists below, these latter characters are shown in italics. Also note that many of these Teams might still be bolstered by Heroes revealed over the course of the Multiverse campaign.

-description from Kickstarter campaign

In that case they don’t touch their Hero cards (neither drawing nor playing) but choose instead one of the Team cards in the Display and play that card in the Storyline, as if it were their own card. boardgame: Marvel United: Multiverse – Kickstarter Promos Box
description:
This set contains all the exclusive stretch goals unlocked during the Kickstarter, including a box to store everything.

Heroes: Corsair, Black Knight, Ch'od, Songbird, Hepzibah, Cyborg Spider-Man, Patriot, Raza, M, Cypher, Chamber, Captain Britain (Betsy Braddock), Speed, Aurora, Husk, Lilandra, Havok (X-Factor), Elsa Bloodstone, Kid Loki, Wiccan, Siryn, Captain America (Sam Wilson), Wong, Meggan, Deathlok, Ghost Rider (Johnny Blaze), Man-Thing, Stature, Werewolf by Night, Moon Girl & Devil Dinosaur

Anti-Heroes: Daken, Darkchild, U.S.Agent, Darkstar, Red Hulk, Ursa Major, Red Guardian, White Widow, Moonstone

Villains: Klaw, Chameleon, Titania, Absorbing Man, Abomination, Crimson Dynamo, Crossbones, Maximums, Iron Patriot, Blastaar, Hobgoblin, High Evolutionary, Enchantress, Gorr, Knull, Mole Man, Lizard. Purple Man, Shocker

Other: Classic Equipment Cards (Retail & Promos), Generic Equipment Cards, Super Hero & Super Villain Cards,  Monster Isle Location, Dark Avengers Mode

Amazing Auction is an auction game where the items you bid on are a combination of cards from two decks - one based on adjectives (e.g. used or mediocre) and one based on nouns (e.g. impressionist painting or sock).  Together, each pair of cards show a number which determines the value of the item up for auction.

The noun deck is formed from cards which each player sees some of privately.  Part way through the game, this deck stops being revealed until the item has been auctioned.

Players start the game with 10 coins and cannot gain additional money.

The player with the most points when all items have been auctioned wins.

boardgame: Marvel United: Multiverse – Fin Fang Foom
description:
Kickstarter Exclusive miniature only available with the Omniverse Pledge but is packaged in its own box.

Contents:

     Fin Fang Foom oversized Miniature
     1 Villain Dashboard
     12 Master Plan Cards
     6 Threat Cards
     1 Location
     2 Challenge Cards


Facing Fin Fang Foom may seem deceptively safe at first. The great space dragon starts the game in deep hibernation, playing cards from his ‘Dormant’ Master Plan deck. These don’t move him or trigger any BAM! What they do is advance the invasion of the rest of his shapeshifting race, the Makluans, adding Thugs and endangering Civilians. Heroes will need to use well this ‘calm before the storm’ phase to prepare themselves while Fin Fang Foom slumbers, completing Missions before his Dormant deck runs out. Once 2 Missions are complete and the Villain is Under Pressure, Foom awakes and switches to his ‘Awake’ Master Plan deck!

Hyper Roll & Write Railroads -Udon Infinity- is a roll and write game based on Roll & Write Railroads.  In this map, players are developing their udon cooking skills and the points they gain each round are multiplied by their oden skills.
Roll the dice to move up the board and climb levels until you reach the top. The first to reach the top gets the flag and is the winner.

boardgame: Third Option: Tip of the Spear
description: Tip of the Spear expansion for Third Option adds unique units with enhanced capabilities. Twelve Tier 1 Sea, Ground, and Air Branch Team unit cards with corresponding counters that include DEVGRU SEAL Team 6, and U.S. Army Delta among others. The expansion also includes new event and asset cards for a total of 46 cards and six counters.

boardgame: Freedom Five: Team-Up Pack – Parse and The Scholar
description:
Two new playable Heroes (Parse and The Scholar), including their Ability Cards, Player Boards, Personal Task Cards and any special tokens. Includes character standees or KS Exclusive miniatures!

—description from the publisher

BLASTBOTS is a competitive race-against-the-clock game with a focus on resource management and strategic card play.

The Story So Far: CHAOS ON KHAOS-5!

For the last 5,000 years, the BLASTBOTS have been locked in an endless battle royale for control over their planet, KHAOS-5! You are the robochief of one of the tribes, and you just detected a gigantic meteor hurtling towards your home. You have two objectives — and only ten turns to accomplish them.

Goal #1: Evacuate as many of your passenger rockets as robot-ily possible before the meteor impacts KHAOS-5!

Goal #2: Sabotage other BLASTBOTS’ escape efforts by bringing their rockets down!

Resource Management
It’s all about strategy. And resources. And management. And resource management. Deploy resource tokens to operate different sections of KHAOS-5’s manufacturing infrastructure. Each section of the board represents different card draws, and you can reallocate your tokens at an opportune moment to surprise your opponents and disrupt their strategies.

Card-driven
There are rocket, battle, and discovery cards, and players can draw from the three different decks based on their resource token placement on the resource grid. 
     
The types of cards:
Rocket cards super-charge your escape efforts, letting your rockets escape the doomed planet into the safety of space.

Battle cards offer different ways to sabotage other robotribes’ escape efforts every step of the way. From destroying rockets in an opponent’s factory, launchpad, or even in the atmosphere, your battle cards can inflict the worst kind of damage. . .MAJOR damage. 
Discovery cards modify rocket and battle cards present rare opportunities to gain an upper hand in this chaotic struggle.

Remember: You’re racing time; and time is pretty quick.
Meteors slow no robot. You start the game with ten turns to evacuate your BLASTBOTS and sabotage your enemies. When the first player’s meteor totem crosses the threshold to IMPACT, the game ends. Big boom — and maybe doom.

—description from the publisher

boardgame: Star Trek: Alliance – The Dominion War Campaign Part I – Essentials Edition
description:
Stardate 49427.7

Note: this is not a new Alliance game. It contains the same game materials as those in Alliance - Dominion War Campaign Part I. It is intended for people who already have the ships, and want to try Alliance, or to get additional copies to play with higher player counts.

The Year is 2371 and the Federation faces a new and very dangerous threat from the Gamma Quadrant. Much is still unknown about our aggressors: The Dominion.

Star Trek: Alliance – Dominion War Campaign is an exciting starship battle game set in the Star Trek universe! Now, players with existing collections of Star Trek: Attack Wing Ships can dive in at a lower price, or can pick up more copies to play with up to 6 players!  This special version of the first Dominion War Campaign box includes only the printed components and dice unique to Alliance.

To play, you will also need a Star Trek Attack Wing Core Set, and the following ships: 1 Excelsior-class (Federation), 1 Akira-class (Federation) and 3 Jem’Hadar Attack Ships (Dominion).

In Star Trek: Alliance, One or more players will create their own Federation captains, form a task force, and work together to defeat the Dominion over a series of campaign missions. This box contains everything one or two players need to play the full campaign, including pre-painted plastic ships, custom dice, cards, tokens, and a 6-mission campaign book. With multiple copies, up to six players can fight the Dominion together!

During each mission, players battle against enemy ships controlled by the game, while completing objectives to earn experience points. Between missions, players spend experience points to upgrade their ships and advance the overall campaign, building their captain into a Starfleet legend!

—description from the publisher

Taproot is a light abstract puzzle strategy game designed for two players that takes 2 minutes to learn and 10 minutes to play.

To set up the game, one player arranges the rock tokens and starting plant in the play area while the other player places the water tokens in the game box, gives it a shake to randomize the tokens, and then spills them out onto the play area.

Starting with the player who most recently watered a plant, players take turns connecting root pieces to the starting plant, aiming to collect as many water tokens of their specific color as possible. Players must strategically avoid rocks, while also being mindful not to inadvertently help the other player with their root placements. The game comes to an end when either player has collected all of their water tokens or no more roots can be placed.

Whether you seek a leisurely, relaxing experience to savor with a cup of tea and casual conversation, or desire an intense, strategic face-off where every root placement counts, Taproot delivers a unique and enjoyable gaming experience each time you sit down to play!

—description from the designer

Tree Hugger: Strategic and educational game of tree survival
Climate events, habitat events, human events, oh my! Combine tree superpowers, ecology, and strategy to build a resilient forest.

Grow a forest to capture the most carbon points. However, your trees must overcome several environmental challenges to survive; these include, climate events, habitat events, and human events. Featuring 12 North American conifer trees and their unique superpowers, you will strategize where to plant, nuture their growth, and devise ways to protect each tree for your forest to thrive.

—description from the designer

A full coop adventure and exploration board game for 1-4 players in the beautiful and dark deep sea. Explore and collect resources, construct buildings, build supply chains, develop your Sirens and fight against different cultures, monsters and bosses. Choose between scenarios and freemode. There are different options and random events that will change the course of your game each time you play. SIRENS has a variety of mechanics, but you don't need them for every scenario.

You can also explore sunken ships, lost caves or go on "scale hunt" for the giant Na'Waakaai (old'being) to receive artifacts and legendary equipment. Hide from strong streams, whirlpools and earthquakes or use them to your advantage.

Develop your sirens and build your own asymmetric ability tree with active and passive abilities by using life stream. Use magical spirit points to unlock powerful special abilities like the Sirens singing (a strong group ability) or unlock different bonus dice in your battle against different cultures

Cards come in one of four base colors. In addition, most cards show a second, different border color on the front side of the card. Five cards are dealt to each player, and a discard pile is seeded. Players take turns in UNO fashion playing a card from their hands that matches colors with the top card in the discard pile as follows: base-to-base, border-to-base, base-to-border, border-to-border, or both-to-both. Draw a card if you cannot make a match; other players draw a card if you match both. The first player to shed all his cards wins.

Drakerion is a Trading Card Game set in a Dark Fantasy universe. The team is made up of veterans of this type of game who wish to offer a unique gameplay experience. With straightforward rules, a dynamic game system, and a focus on interaction, player skill is what determines who wins in Drakerion. We invite you to a brand new adventure beautifully portrayed by some amazing international artists.

Welcome to Drakerion: The playing and trading card game.
In this game, play one of the five factions, use its tactics and strategy to defeat your opponent and lead your troops to victory!

There are two ways a player can win the game:
If at any point of the game a player has no Character left on the battlefield, they lose the game and their opponent wins the game. 
If a player has 20 prestige points or more, they win the game. Players will accumulate prestige mainly by destroying opposing Characters: The more powerful a Character is, the more prestige their opponent will gain when they are destroyed.

Do you like to gaze at the night sky? Have you ever admired the rich imagination of our Greek ancestors, who saw Pegasus or Virgo in all these myriads of stars? Now you have a chance to become Star Artists and discover your own constellations!

Each round you choose one leader, the rest of the players become a drawing team. The drawing team gets a task – a random noun which will be the name of the constellation. The team also gets a page of a sky atlas to draw on. Each Artist gets a geometric shape which they should use in their artwork. The twist is that it is a fully cooperative game, so the Artists draw the constellation as a team, but they can not discuss what exactly everyone should draw. Try to find Silence or Spring constellation on your page of the sky atlas! It is not easy, but great fun! When the art is over, the leader tries to guess the correct name by choosing among several open name cards.

Promo tile for Powerline in English and German that provides a helpful catch up mechanic for the player in last place on the Victory track.

At the end of each round: if one single player is in the last position of the VP track, they gain the Sunny Island and place it on top of the island in their player board. In the next round, they will not lose VP if they deploy workers on the Sunny Island. If there is a new player in the last position at the end of that round, the Sunny Island is passed to them, otherwise it remains where it is.

boardgame: Не закороти Цепь! Последовательная история (Do Not Short Circuit! Series story)
description:
The goal of the players is to repair the electrical circuit of the robot's communication panel by installing token modules with electronic components and laying closed electrical circuits from plus to minus power, trying to light up as many bulbs and LEDs as possible.

In this case, short circuits, high current supply to the LEDs and improper installation of electronic components must be avoided. Whoever scores the most points at the end is the best electronics!

—description from the designer

Players strive to create chains of identical "Group of Chemical Elements" tokens by placing them from their hand or moving them around the field. Having collected a chain, the player will choose a “Chemical Element” card for himself, and from several such cards he will be able to get a “Chemical Compound”. All cards received bring the player victory points, and the game will be won by the one who has scored the most points.

—description from the designer

description:
“What you do not smell is called Iocaine powder. It is odourless, tasteless, dissolves instantly in liquid, and is among the more deadly poisons known to man.”

.          - Vizzini (former Sicilian criminal mastermind)
.

Iocaine is a devious little “battle of wits… to the death” for 2-players, played with just 18 cards in 5-15 mins.

Six of the cards display either Poison or Elixir - it is your goal to employ the 3 suits (Skill, Strength and Wit) to manipulate your opponent into taking tricks containing 3 Poisons or 3 Elixirs, thus proving who is right... and who is dead.

boardgame: Marvel Champions: The Card Game – Psylocke Hero Pack
description:
A powerful telepath and skilled martial artist, Psylocke’s psionic knives can cleave her enemies’ minds as easily as her katanas cut through their armor. As a member of both X-Force and the X-Men, she is willing to go to any lengths—and would even lay down her life—for her team. Now, Psylocke powers her way into your games of Marvel Champions: The Card Game! By switching between her Psi-Knives and Psi-Katantas, Psylocke can boost her ATK or THW stats to fit her needs, giving her unparalleled versatility. Within this Hero Pack, you will find Psylocke, her seventeen signature cards, and a full assortment of Justice cards inviting you to thwart the villains’ schemes.

—description from the publisher
family: Collectible: Living Card Game (Fantasy Flight Games)
Game: Marvel Champions – The Card Game

boardgame: O Bom, o Mau e o Mexicano
description:
Welcome to The Good, the Bad and the Mexican! Travel to the past and be the fastest trigger in the wild west!

The Good, the Bad and the Mexican uses an innovative card draw and discard mechanic, which requires decisions and risks for you and your opponents! Plan your moves with a mix of Uno to get ahead or complicate the lives of other players.

But remember, you are not alone in this duel! Your opponents also aim for victory, and will make your way a real challenge!

DRAW, PILGRIM!

How to play?
Each player starts with four cards, and the object of the game is to collect five cards of the same color or value. On the player's turn, he draws a card from the top of the deck or the top card from the discard pile, and must discard another card from his hand. When discarding a card, the text of the card is activated, such as skipping the next player's turn.

—description from the designer

Bem-vindo a “O Bom, o Mau e o Mexicano”! Viaje para o passado e seja o gatilho mais rápido do velho oeste!

“O Bom, O Mau e o Mexicano” usa uma inovadora mecânica de compra e descarte de cartas, que exigem decisões e riscos para você e os seus adversários! Planeje suas jogadas com um misto de “Uno” e “Cacheta” para sair na frente ou complicar a vida dos outros jogadores.

Mas lembre-se, você não está sozinho neste duelo! Seus adversários também almejam a vitória, e farão do seu caminho um verdadeiro desafio!

—description from the designer (Portuguese)

Tabernacle of Yahweh is a resource and worker placement Board Game based on a defining period in the history on the nation of Israel. Described in the Bible from the Book of Exodus 25 the Tribes of Israel, after the Exodus from Egypt, are called to bring voluntary offerings to construct a Tabernacle (Heb: Mishkan) or Dwelling Place for Yahweh, the God of Israel, and all the objects pertaining to it:
“And Yahweh spoke to Moses, saying, 'Speak to the children of Israel that they bring Me an offering. You shall take an offering from every man that gives it willingly with his heart. And this is the offering which you shall take of them: gold, and silver, and bronze, and blue, and purple, and scarlet, and fine linen, and goats' hair, and rams' skins dyed red, and fine leather, and acacia-wood, oil for the light, spices for anointing oil and for sweet incense, onyx stones, and stones to be set in the ephod and in the breastplate. And let them make Me a Sanctuary, so that I may dwell among them.' ” (Exodus 25:1-8)

Each player takes control of a Tribe, and beginning with three, will collect resources by either rolling each Tribe member's die or placing their die on the Action Board and use those resources to expand their tribe and fill requirements for the construction of the Tabernacle. Resources have differing values and will receive varying points by placing them on the Tabernacle Board, thus bringing the game to an end when all spaces are filled. Through strategic use of resources and a bit of luck, the Tribe with the most points at this time will be declared the winner!

—description from the publisher

Odds Of Chaos is a card where each player is trying to be the first to get rid of all the cards in their hand. This is done by matching the active card's suite color, number or phrase.

This game has a range of challenge and wild cards that can drastically impact how many cards a player is holding and the length of the game. The wild cards are weighted to be more beneficial during the beginning and middle of the game. However, because the cards in a player's hand can change quickly, strategy is limited but nothing is all luck.

The combination of using shape and color for suites was intentional to make the game more inclusive for players with impaired color vision.

—description from the publisher

Creativity is an additional card for the Dangerous Deck in Stellar Leap.

Creativity has no overpopulated resources listed as it can't be overpopulated! It is also special due to the fact that it generates every resource and if you labor here, you can get three resources of choice. It's the planet with the highest threat level in the game, but if you can get there, it'll definitely pay off.

boardgame: Magic: The Gathering – Zendikar Rising Commander: Sneak Attack
description:
Seize Power Once More

Choose your commander and overcome both friend and foe in this definitive multiplayer Magic format. Ally with Anowon and lead an army of rogues to take what is rightfully yours. The larger your collective, the more your influence grows.

Anowon, the Ruin Thief

Formerly a renowned mage and scholar, Anowon's reputation and fortune have diminished in recent years. With the appearance of the ancient Kor Skyclaves, he knows his return to glory lies deep in the ruins–and he'll do anything to find it.

Contents:
100 card deck with 3 new cards
Deck box
10 double-sided token cards

Plus:
Life Wheel
Strategy insert
Reference card

—description from publisher

Dice Tiny Town is a 1-2 player roll-and-write game using dice and a pencil.

You create a town by drawing blocks on a 7x7 map and filling them with buildings and nature. The result of three dice determines the shape of the tetromino block and the building and nature in the block.

When you draw a pentomino block, you can invite a visitor to your town. If you make the visitor happy, you get bonus points.

Aim for a high score by placing buildings and natural features and keeping your invited visitors happy.

—description from the designer

In this game, you decide together what will happen in a young woman's life. Your character is going to encounter different situations that women face every day. It’s up to you how you choose to react, but remember that these choices have different consequences... The game is created to ignite discussions about gender equality. And maybe you disagree with something in the game...? Or it encourages you to share your personal experiences...? Let’s explore together what being a WOMAN means to you!

Gameplay

Choose one player who will be a narrator.
Take the first card from the Childhood pile. The narrator reads out loud the title of the card, the description of the event and possible choices: A and B. Discuss them within your group and decide together - How do you react in this situation? Try to be unanimous. If it’s impossible, you may vote, but always share your arguments.
Turn the card and read the consequences of your choice. Add or subtract the appropriate number of points on your mini boards.
The next player becomes the narrator, picks up the next card and reads out loud for everyone. The game goes on like this.
If the last card in your pile is the special card - it will tell you what to do next.
If your points drop to “zero” on one of the mini boards - flip the mini board over and read the text on the back of it. Bring new rules to the game.
If it’s written to draw a special card - take it, read it out loud and bring new rules to the game.

The end of the game
It’s a LOSS if your points on two mini boards drop to “zero”.
You WIN if you finish the pile of Motherhood or the pile of Career cards.

We wanted to come up with a game where conversations are the main focus. Because we think that young people learn best from each other. With those thoughts we created WOGO.
WOGO is a conversation game where you win by coming up with the best/funniest/most different... answer to one of the questions about the 17 SDG’s.
The questions are about sustainability and the 17 world goals. We came up with the title of the game by merging the two words “WORLD” and “GOALS” - which is exactly what the game is about.

boardgame: Natural-Selection: Combine & Create – zieodalis Expansion Set
description:
Create over 1,000 new creatures featuring art by zieodalis. This expansion set contains 54 brand new creature cards and 1 prompt card.

The party game Natural-Selection: Combine & Create contains two decks: Picture Cards and Prompt Cards. Each round, every player draws up to five Pictures Cards in their hand. One player will reveal a Prompt Card and become the judge for the round. The other players will combine two Picture Cards in their hand to create a creature that best fits the Prompt Card and place them face-down. Going clockwise from the judge, players will reveal their creatures and describe why it best fits the prompt. The judge will award the Prompt Card to their favorite creature. The player to the left of the judge will become the new judge for the next round. The first player to be awarded 5 Prompt Cards wins.

—description from the publisher

boardgame: Natural-Selection: Combine & Create – Swell Guy Expansion Set
description:
Create over 1,000 new creatures featuring art by Swell Guy Customs. This expansion set contains 54 brand new creature cards and 1 prompt card.

The party game Natural-Selection: Combine & Create contains two decks: Picture Cards and Prompt Cards. Each round, every player draws up to five Pictures Cards in their hand. One player will reveal a Prompt Card and become the judge for the round. The other players will combine two Picture Cards in their hand to create a creature that best fits the Prompt Card and place them face-down. Going clockwise from the judge, players will reveal their creatures and describe why it best fits the prompt. The judge will award the Prompt Card to their favorite creature. The player to the left of the judge will become the new judge for the next round. The first player to be awarded 5 Prompt Cards wins.

—description from the publisher

C1 is a Chess style abstract strategy game for two players, involving ten geometric shapes that move over a dynamic playing board — a modular surface that moves and gradually disappears.

Inspired by the geometric shapes and dual level form of ALTAR, allied with the cube mechanism created for AXIOM transferred from a 3D to a 2D world.

The name C1 can be expressed as C one or Cone.

boardgame: Krimi total: Des Alters fette Beute
description:
The Story

Edith, Bernd and Paul had been close friends since their student days. Together they had expanded the Stettenwerke, which Paul had taken over from his parents 49 years ago, into a successful mechanical engineering company. Their common path through life has fatefully welded the three friends together.

Six months ago Paul had sold his company. In order to spend his old age in style and with all amenities, he has rented a luxurious retirement home for himself, Edith and Bernd and their spouses. Since then, the five companions have lived in their own wing on the first floor of a historical building ensemble. Two personal carers lovingly take care of their well-being.

But this afternoon Paul lay lifeless in his bed. Deaths are the order of the day in a retirement home, but a possibly unnatural death would mean great damage to the image of the facility. The residence management is therefore determined to resolve the matter internally without making a fuss.

Die Geschichte

Edith, Bernd und Paul verband seit Studientagen eine enge Freundschaft. Gemeinsam hatten sie die Stettenwerke, die Paul vor 49 Jahren von seinen Eltern übernommen hatte, zu einem erfolgreichen Maschinenbauunternehmen ausgebaut. Ihr gemeinsamer Lebensweg hat die drei Freunde schicksalhaft zusammengeschweißt.

Vor einem halben Jahr hatte Paul seine Firma verkauft. Um seinen Lebensabend stilvoll und mit allen Annehmlichkeiten zu verbringen, hat er sich, Edith und Bernd sowie deren Ehepartner in einer luxuriösen Seniorenresidenz eingemietet. Die fünf Weggefährten bewohnen seither einen eigenen Trakt im ersten Obergeschoss eines historischen Gebäudeensembles. Zwei persönliche Pflegekräfte kümmern sich liebevoll um ihr Wohlergehen.

Doch heute Nachmittag lag Paul leblos in seinem Bett. Sterbefälle sind in einer Seniorenresidenz zwar an der Tagesordnung, aber ein möglicherweise unnatürliches Ableben würde einen großen Imageschaden für die Einrichtung bedeuten. Deshalb ist die Residenzleitung fest entschlossen, die Angelegenheit ohne großes Aufsehen intern zu klären.

Sixty-six cards are numbered from 3 to 30 in multiples of three, with each number appearing on several cards. Players take turns playing cards onto one of two discard piles so that the number of the card played is either 3 greater than or 3 less than the top card in the pile. Draw a card if you cannot play. The first player to shed his hand wins. There also is a speed version with simultaneous play.

Fifty-six cards numbered one through ten are all dealt. Players take turns placing one or more cards face down onto a stack and announcing their value, which must be one less than or one greater than the value of the card(s) played by the previous player. The direction of play and the direction of value (rising or falling) can be altered by special cards. Players can challenge the announced value. The loser of the challenge collects the stack of played cards. The first player to rid his hand of cards wins.

Welcome to a new planet! Develop your space colony in this solo card game of strategy and resource management.

Pocket Planet is an easy to learn in-hand card game which you can play everywhere.

Theme: space exploration and planet terraforming.

Goal: Expand your colony by upgrading cards and creating combos, without running out of energy.

Gameplay : Each turn, the player will be able to choose a number of cards he wants to play (2 or 3) and then, depending on the resources produced, he'll upgrade his cards by rotating them and then move them to the back of his Plan. When the player reaches the Energy card, he loses 1 energy and he can re-arrange his plan by moving one card to generate better combos.

Creating powerful combos is key: by using 10 resources, a user can buy 1 energy and make the game last longer.

End of the game: the game ends when you reach 0 energy. You count your points to see how good an intergalactic colonist you are.

—description from designer
language_dependency: 2: Some necessary text - easily memorized or small crib sheet

description:
You and your opponents step onto the platform, weapons ready.  Everyone at the prestigious Pearwood House is watching, evaluating.  Victory may go to the last fighter standing, but it may also go to the most aggressive fighter, whether or not that fighter is conscious at the end, so do not back down.

Pearwood House Rules of Combat is a card-driven martial-arts-style combat game with a unique focus on positioning and fighter-fighter interaction.  Your every attack, every defense, every push and shift will move you and your opponent around the platform.  Your opponent's responses will set up new positions for you to consider.  Smash your foes into obstacles, throw them off the platform, or send your weapon through their defenses and send them stumbling.

You must manage your supply of move cards, build up focus by employing the proper stance, rid yourself of seemingly never-ending fatigue cards, and, ideally, keep your endurance above 0 to stay conscious.  Amass aggression tokens to win... or you could just knock everyone else out, but with only 4 rounds to do so, you'd have to go hard.

—description from the designer

A basic roll-and-move game, where you are trying to discard four pyramid tokens to win the game.

On a player's turn, they roll the die and move their pawn around the board. Depending on the space they land on, the player may lose a turn, be allowed to discard a pyramid token, or be trapped on a panda space. When trapped on a panda space, players cannot move until at least 2 other players come to the spot to free them.

Once a player as discarded all four of their pyramid tokens, and reached the Pyramid of Power space, they win the game.

—user summary

Players take turns drawing a card from a face-down deck of cards that depict celestial objects, some with positive numbers and some with negative numbers. The players place the drawn cards face-up in front of them. The first player to reach one hundred when the negative values are subtracted from the positive ones wins. A few cards have special properties that, when drawn, can affect the tableaux of other players.

The world is changing and climate change is an ever-increasing problem for nature and humanity. Now it is up to the players whether they want to save the world or sacrifice the earth’s future for profit.

The aim of the game is to save the climate as a group. At the same time, the players have to keep an eye on their money reserves and invest them efficiently and strategically.

However, natural disasters such as floods, desertification, or forest fires keep putting obstacles in the way.

The challenge is to earn enough money to avoid going bankrupt, but also not to focus on making too much money, otherwise, you will damage the climate and lose out. In addition, you have to focus on innovative ideas, which are a bit more expensive than CO₂ cards, but more climate-friendly. For every 5 monetary points you gain, you will be credited with one climate point at the end. In the end, whoever has collected the most climate points wins.

Two two-sided tiles with 4 additional objectives.

Tile 1
Wake the Neighbors: Score 4 VP per set of 1 Downtown, 1 Residential, and 1 Shopping icon within a cluster.
Back
Paint the Town: 8 VP per set of 1 Park, 1 Industrial, 1 Downtown, 1 Residential, and 1 Shopping icon withing a cluster.

Tile 2
Terminal Tagger: Score the number of Train Stations you've tagged. 1 = 3pts; 2 = 6pts; 3 = 10pts; 4 or more = 15pts.
Back
Rail Rider: Score the number of Railways you've tagged (rounded down). 3 = 5pts; 5 = 10pts; 7 = 16pts; 9 or more = 25pts.

Players take the role of a new book publishing house, seeking to sign quality authors and publish their best works. By publishing best sellers and creating a diverse library of works they not only make money, but achieve the trust and confidence of the bookreading public.

Each turn begins with a die roll. Where this roll matches the  dice players have placed, they activate, bringing in authors, books and money, or moving books further along the publishing pipeline, earning sales along the way.

Activated dice always reduce their value by one, and are eventually removed, so the player's holdings and situation are always in flux. Players must constantly evaluate where they stand and decide how best to place their new dice, not only with respect to their own tableaus, but also those of the opponents.

Players interact, not merely competing to create the best selling books, but also by signing away others' authors, and even their books.

—description from the designer
language_dependency: 3: Moderate in-game text - needs crib sheet or paste ups
family: Books: Dr. Jekyll and Mr. Hyde

description:
Who will manage to sink the golf ball in the fewest moves?
Each card in the 7×7 grid shows either a number from 1 to 5 or wild in each direction (orthogonal and diagonal), which is the distance you can hit your ball. Starting at the golf ball card, try to make it to each hole (flag numbered 1-18) in less moves than your opponents.

Five dice are split into pairs and a single, with very high or low results being most desirable. The pairs are recorded in one section and the single in another section. Whoever combines their dice well and gets the highest points wins.

Welcome to Through Hell And Back!
Step back into the heart of World War II and experience the compelling and perilous world of piloting a bomber. You will take on the role of the crew of a bomber, heading out on daring missions deep into enemy territory.
